arts.ttl: Serie A Preview: Monza vs Napoli – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction
arts.sum: Stadio Brianeto forms the backdrop for Saturday's 'make or break' Serie A encounter between basement boys Monza and runners-up Napoli. Three points are imperative for both teams, as anything less could put a final nail in the coffin of their season dreams. The post Serie A Preview: Monza vs Napoli – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
Joe Casey has taken a look at the fixture list for matchday 33 of the Serie A season, picking out a score prediction for each match.
